title: Axes marked ‘Mossad’ and ‘Sieg Heil’: Man arrested in alleged plot against Dutch Princess Amalia, Alexia
description: Dutch police arrested a 33-year-old man for allegedly plotting to murder Princesses Amalia and Alexia. Authorities found axes inscribed with “Sieg Heil” and “Mossad,” alongside a note threatening a “bloodbath” against the royals.

title: Iran to turn university hit in US-Israeli strikes into museum
description: Isfahan University of Technology was targeted in a US-Israeli strike in March, causing damage to the facility consideered among the largest universities in Iran
